ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, pp. 405 - 406 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.) For Giuseppe Squillaci`s affiliation to the Chiari academy in Catania see Giuseppe Squillaci, La Sant`Agata, Catania, 1663
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
